info.name: Zentro API
info.description:
Kenya CBC JSS timetable management API.

**Auth:** All endpoints marked 🔒 require a Firebase ID token.
Set `authToken` in the collection variables, or run `GET /users/me` first to verify your token.

**Base URL:** change `baseUrl` in collection variables to point at your environment.

variable.description: Firebase ID token — paste the raw token (without 'Bearer ').
ID of a stream returned by upsert or list.
ID of a teacher returned by create or list.
UUID of a timetable run returned by generate or list runs.

item.name: Auth & Registration
item.description: User lookup and school account registration. These endpoints read the Firebase token directly from the Authorization header.

request.description:
Returns the authenticated user's profile. Verifies the Firebase token and returns the matching User node from the graph.

**Responses**
- `200` — user profile
- `401` — missing or invalid Authorization header

Creates a School node in the graph linked to the authenticated Firebase UID. Call once per account.

**Responses**
- `200` — newly created school
- `401` — missing or invalid Authorization header

item.name: School
item.description: School profile and CBC subject catalogue. All endpoints require a valid Firebase token. 🔒

request.description:
Returns the authenticated school's profile (name, email, county, subCounty).

**Responses**
- `200` — school profile
- `403` — account is not a school

Updates mutable fields on the school profile. Omit any field to leave it unchanged. `fedUid` and `email` are never overwritten.

**Responses**
- `200` — updated school
- `403` — account is not a school
- `404` — school not found

Returns all 10 CBC JSS learning areas seeded at startup, each enriched with a `teacherCount` — the number of teachers at this school qualified to teach that subject.

**Responses**
- `200` — list of SchoolSubject objects

item.name: Streams
item.description: Class group (stream) management. All endpoints require a valid Firebase token. 🔒

request.description:
Returns all streams for the authenticated school, ordered by grade level then name. Each stream includes its form teacher if one has been assigned.

**Responses**
- `200` — list of Stream objects
- `403` — account is not a school

Creates a new stream. Omit `id` to trigger a create. `formTeacher` is optional — supply `{ "id": "<teacherId>" }` to assign one.

`reStrand` must be one of `CRE`, `IRE`, `HRE`. Defaults to `CRE` if omitted.

**Responses**
- `200` — created stream with generated id
- `400` — validation error (gradeLevel out of range, blank name, etc.)
- `403` — account is not a school
- `404` — school or form teacher not found
- `409` — form teacher already assigned to another stream

Updates an existing stream. Supply `id` to trigger an update. Only provided fields are changed — omit a field to leave it unchanged.

**Responses**
- `200` — updated stream
- `400` — validation error
- `403` — account is not a school
- `404` — stream or form teacher not found
- `409` — form teacher already assigned to another stream

Deletes the stream and all its relationships (form teacher link, timetable entries). This is a hard delete — it cannot be undone.

**Responses**
- `200` — stream deleted
- `403` — account is not a school
- `404` — stream not found under this school

item.name: Teachers
item.description: Teaching staff management. All endpoints require a valid Firebase token. 🔒

request.description:
Returns all teachers for the authenticated school ordered by name. Each teacher includes their qualified subject IDs.

**Responses**
- `200` — list of Teacher objects
- `403` — account is not a school

Creates a new teacher linked to the authenticated school.

`subjectIds` accepts 1–2 CBC subject IDs from: `ENG`, `KIS`, `MAT`, `SCI`, `PTS`, `SST`, `RE`, `AGR`, `CAS`.

`maxPeriodsPerWeek` defaults to 23, `maxPeriodsPerDay` defaults to 6.

**Responses**
- `200` — created teacher with generated id
- `400` — validation error (missing name, missing subjects, etc.)
- `403` — account is not a school
- `409` — email already in use

Updates a teacher's details. Supply `id` plus any fields to change — omit a field to leave it unchanged.

If `subjectIds` is provided it **fully replaces** the current subject list (1–2 entries required).

**Responses**
- `200` — updated teacher
- `400` — validation error
- `403` — account is not a school
- `404` — teacher not found under this school
- `409` — email already taken by another teacher

Deletes the teacher and all their relationships (HAS_TEACHER, TEACHES, FORM_TEACHER). This is a hard delete.

**Responses**
- `200` — teacher deleted
- `403` — account is not a school
- `404` — teacher not found under this school

item.name: Timetable
item.description:
Timetable generation and retrieval. All endpoints require a valid Firebase token. 🔒

Typical flow:
1. `POST /generate` → note the returned `runId`
2. Poll `GET /runs/{runId}` until `solverStatus` is `OPTIMAL` or `FEASIBLE`
3. Fetch per-stream or per-teacher views using the same `runId`

request.description:
Triggers async timetable generation for the school. Returns immediately with a run whose `status` is `RUNNING`. The solver runs in the background.

`timeLimitSeconds` defaults to `120` if omitted.

Poll `GET /runs/{runId}` for completion.

**Responses**
- `200` — run created (save the `id` as `runId`)
- `403` — account is not a school
- `500` — run could not be persisted

Returns all timetable runs for the school, newest first. Useful for listing history or finding a previous run's ID.

**Responses**
- `200` — list of TimetableRun objects
- `403` — account is not a school

Returns a single run including `solverStatus`, `objectiveValue`, `diagnosticReport`, and any `violations`. Poll this endpoint after `POST /generate` until `solverStatus` is no longer `RUNNING`.

**Responses**
- `200` — TimetableRun
- `403` — account is not a school
- `404` — run not found

Returns all timetable entries for a specific stream within a completed run. Each entry includes day, period, start/end times, subject, teacher, and double-period flags.

**Responses**
- `200` — list of TimetableEntry objects (40 per week)
- `403` — account is not a school

Returns all timetable entries assigned to a specific teacher within a completed run — their personal weekly schedule.

**Responses**
- `200` — list of TimetableEntry objects
- `403` — account is not a school
